data.description:
# WS5 — Fail-closed secrets/security detectors

## Why
The hard auto-block is reserved for high-precision categories (secrets / High-Critical security). The grounding-oracle detector REGISTRY shipped (epic 8f6c, with OpenGrep/ast-grep), but the secrets/security detectors themselves are pending — flagged by both 3316 and 8f6c as "shared with b744." Crucially, the hard auto-block must NOT inherit the oracle's general fail-OPEN posture: a missing/errored detector must FAIL CLOSED, never silently skip a block.

## What
- Wrap `gitleaks` (secrets) + `semgrep` (High-Critical security) behind the grounding-oracle detector envelope as deterministic ground truth (the LLM triages/prioritizes; it does not invent vulns) — scanner-as-ground-truth, the settled production pattern.
- Wire the auto-block: secrets/High-Critical findings map to a hard BLOCK in the Pass-3 decide step.
- FAIL-CLOSED: if a secrets/security detector input is UNAVAILABLE or errors, the block category fails closed (or surfaces an explicit coverage gap on the vote).

## Scope
- `src/rebar/grounding/detectors/` — gitleaks + semgrep detector wrappers (extends the 8f6c registry).
- The auto-block wiring in `gates/code-review.yaml` / the decide step / the threshold resolver.
- OUT OF SCOPE: native first-party detectors (follow-on); the Gerrit voter (WS6). NOTE: if a SECOND consumer of these detectors appears, promote this story to a shared grounding story rather than a b744 child.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] gitleaks + semgrep are wrapped behind the grounding-oracle detector envelope and emit findings the gate consumes as ground truth (LLM triages, does not invent).
- [ ] Secrets / High-Critical-security findings map to a hard BLOCK in Pass-3; everything else stays advisory at the starting (high) thresholds.
- [ ] FAIL-CLOSED: a RED-fixture test asserts that an UNAVAILABLE or errored secrets/security detector causes a BLOCK (or an explicit coverage gap on the vote), NEVER a silent pass; fail-open-for-coverage applies to advisory grounding only.
data.title: WS5: Secrets/security detectors (gitleaks/semgrep) behind the grounding-oracle envelope — fail-closed + RED-fixture test
